summary: 9277 Outreach Team Lead and programming and mechanical team member.
responsibilities: Founding member of FIRST Robotics Team 9277; served as Design Lead and later led outreach across school robotics teams.
Contributed to mechanical builds, code development, and strategic planning.
Spearheaded initiatives to grow STEM awareness in the community.
achievements: Lead programmer and mentor for FRC Team 10384 — technical development and mentoring younger members in programming and robotics principles.
Featured in CTV News for community outreach and STEM education with Sparkans Robotics at an international competition.

responsibilities: Joined school debate team in 2023 — a major shift from STEM-focused activities.
Trained consistently to improve argumentation, clarity, and presence.
achievements: Ranked in the top 10 in Calgary and advanced to the provincial level.
Strengthened communication skills that transfer directly into STEM leadership and presentation.

organization: University of Calgary · Intelligent Dynamics Control Lab
summary: Worked with the Intelligent Dynamics Control Lab to create an efficient method for crop monitoring using IoT drone systems.
responsibilities: Developed a real-time crop monitoring drone system integrating IoT sensors.
Tracked environmental data such as temperature, humidity, and light levels.
Collaborated with a multidisciplinary team on sensor integration and data analysis.
achievements: Contributed to a low-cost solution enhancing agricultural efficiency while minimizing fieldwork.
WISE STEM Award recipient; presented at WISE Research Symposium.

organization: Vascular Training Platform (VAST) · University of Calgary
summary: Researched Vascular Diseases and neuroimaging techniques at VAST Platform UofC.
responsibilities: Applied advanced neuroimaging techniques including MRI and Transcranial Doppler Ultrasound.
Assessed and analyzed cerebral health with leading experts.
Engaged in cognitive assessments related to lifestyle factors and dementia prevention.
achievements: Built foundational expertise for future innovations in medical science and neuroimaging applications.

summary: Represented 1000+ students in Alberta to work closely with the Minister of Education and fellow council members to address key issues in our education system.
responsibilities: One of 40 students selected province-wide to provide youth perspectives on provincial education.
Focused on enhancing the COVID reentry plan for students, particularly K-6.
achievements: Proposed a transition period dedicated to reading and math while leveraging STEAM courses to strengthen skills impacted by educational isolation.

summary: Shadowed Vincent Chaley, invenstor in prime energy, meeting with startup businesses and gaining insights into entrepreneurship and innovation.
responsibilities: Attended the 4th seminar of CDL Rockies (April 2023) where startups presented products and development plans to mentors and sponsors.
Shadowed Vincent Chaley at the intersection of commerce and agriculture.
achievements: Enhanced public speaking by presenting ideas to mentors.
Gained business-sector knowledge and expanded professional network around leading technologies.
